style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#008a00;fontColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#005700;align=left;" value="<div style="line-height: 110%;"><ol><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"><font>Authenticated user sends planning request</font></span></li><li><font><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">API Gateway invokes </span><code data-start="1131" data-end="1146" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">StartPlanning</code></font></li><li><font><code data-start="1152" data-end="1167" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">StartPlanning</code><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"> stores initial job metadata and input</span></font></li><li><font><code data-start="1211" data-end="1226" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">StartPlanning</code><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"> sends the request to SQS</span></font></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"><font>Step Functions starts the workflow</font></span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"><font>Fargate runs the planning process</font></span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"><font>Planning output and route data are stored in S3</font></span></li><li><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"><font>Workflow updates final job status and metadata</font></span></li><li><font><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">User requests job status with </span><code data-start="1471" data-end="1494" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">GET /planning/{jobId}</code></font></li><li><font><code data-start="1501" data-end="1520" style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));">GetPlanningStatus</code><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));"> retrieves job status and result</span></font></li></ol></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="240" width="250" x="830" y="680" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
